landing.badge: Akole portfolio ti o ga julọ fun awọn olupilẹṣẹ
landing.subtitle: Ohun gbogbo ti o nilo lati ṣafihan awọn ọgbọn rẹ, awọn iṣẹ akanṣe, ati iriri.
landing.featuresSubtitle: A pese gbogbo awọn irinṣẹ ti o nilo lati jade kuro ninu ogunlọgọ ati gbe iṣẹ ala rẹ silẹ.
landing.feature1Desc: Ni irọrun ṣeto awọn apakan rẹ, awọn iṣẹ akanṣe, ati awọn ọgbọn pẹlu olootu wiwo inu inu wa.
landing.feature2Desc: Yan lati awọn awoṣe ti a ṣe agbejoro tabi ṣẹda iwo alailẹgbẹ tirẹ.
landing.feature3Desc: Tọpinpin awọn alejo rẹ, wo iru awọn iṣẹ akanṣe ti o gba akiyesi julọ, ati diẹ sii.

privacy.title: Asiri Afihan
privacy.updateDate: Imudojuiwọn to kẹhin: Oṣu Keje 15, Ọdun 2026
privacy.intro: Ilana Aṣiri yii ṣe alaye bi DevFolio ṣe n gba, nlo, ati aabo alaye ti ara ẹni rẹ nigba lilo awọn iṣẹ wa.
privacy.section1Content: A n gba alaye ti o pese taara nigba ṣiṣẹda akọọlẹ kan, kọ portfolio kan, ati kikan si atilẹyin wa.
privacy.section2Content: A lo alaye rẹ lati ṣiṣẹ, ṣetọju, ati pese awọn ẹya ti awọn iṣẹ wa, bakannaa lati ba ọ sọrọ nipa akọọlẹ tabi awọn iṣẹ rẹ.
privacy.section3Content: A ṣe awọn igbese aabo to ni oye lati daabobo alaye rẹ lati iraye si laigba aṣẹ, sisọ, tabi iparun.

forgotPassword.otpSentToEmail: Ti fi koodu OTP ranṣẹ si imeeli rẹ.
forgotPassword.emailThirdParty: Imeeli yii ti forukọsilẹ nipasẹ ẹgbẹ kẹta.
forgotPassword.genericError: Asise kan wa. Jọwọ gbiyanju lẹẹkansi.
forgotPassword.otpVerified: Awọn koodu OTP ti ni idaniloju ni aṣeyọri.
forgotPassword.otpExpired: Koodu OTP ti pari. Jọwọ beere koodu titun kan.
forgotPassword.otpResent: A ti fi koodu OTP titun ranṣẹ si imeeli rẹ.
forgotPassword.otpResendFailed: Kuna lati tun koodu OTP ranṣẹ. Jọwọ gbiyanju lẹẹkansi.
forgotPassword.passwordResetSuccess: Ọrọigbaniwọle ni aṣeyọri tunto. Jọwọ wọle pẹlu ọrọ igbaniwọle tuntun rẹ.
forgotPassword.passwordResetFailed: O kuna lati tun ọrọ igbaniwọle to.
forgotPassword.title: Gbagbe Ọrọigbaniwọle
forgotPassword.description: Tẹ adirẹsi imeeli ti a forukọsilẹ sori akọọlẹ rẹ sii. A yoo fi koodu OTP ranṣẹ lati tun ọrọ igbaniwọle to.
forgotPassword.verifyOtpDesc: Tẹ koodu oni-nọmba 6 ti o ti firanṣẹ si imeeli rẹ lati jẹrisi idanimọ rẹ.
forgotPassword.newPasswordDesc: Ṣẹda titun kan, lagbara ọrọigbaniwọle lati oluso àkọọlẹ rẹ.

verifyEmail.resendError: Kuna lati tun fi imeeli ijẹrisi ranṣẹ. Jọwọ gbiyanju lẹẹkansi.
verifyEmail.title: Ṣayẹwo Imeeli Rẹ
verifyEmail.description: A ti fi imeeli ijẹrisi ranṣẹ si adirẹsi imeeli rẹ. Jọwọ ṣii imeeli naa ki o tẹ bọtini <1>“ Jẹrisi Account”</1> lati mu akọọlẹ rẹ ṣiṣẹ.
verifyEmail.step1: Ṣii ohun elo imeeli rẹ (Gmail, Yahoo, ati bẹbẹ lọ)
verifyEmail.step2: Wa imeeli lati ọdọ DevFolio pẹlu koko-ọrọ naa "Imuṣiṣẹsiṣẹ iroyin"
verifyEmail.step4: A yoo dari ọ si oju-iwe wiwọle lati tẹ
verifyEmail.resendSuccess: Imeeli ijerisi naa ti fi ranṣẹ!
verifyEmail.footerNote: Ṣe ko gba imeeli naa? Ṣayẹwo folda <1>Spam</1> tabi <2>Junk</2> ninu imeeli rẹ. Ọna asopọ ijẹrisi wulo fun <3>wakati 24</3>.
